name: Google Calendar
description: Create, read, update, and delete Google Calendar events
author: awaitstep

action.label: Action
action.description: The Google Calendar action to perform.

calendarId.label: Calendar ID
calendarId.description: Calendar ID. Defaults to primary calendar.

eventId.label: Event ID
eventId.description: Event ID. Used by: Get Event, Update Event, Delete Event.

summary.label: Summary
summary.description: Event title. Used by: Create Event, Update Event.

description.label: Description
description.description: Event description. Used by: Create Event, Update Event.

startTime.label: Start Time
startTime.description: ISO 8601 start time. Used by: Create Event, Update Event.

endTime.label: End Time
endTime.description: ISO 8601 end time. Used by: Create Event, Update Event.

location.label: Location
location.description: Event location. Used by: Create Event, Update Event.

timeMin.label: Time Min
timeMin.description: List events after this time. Used by: List Events.

timeMax.label: Time Max
timeMax.description: List events before this time. Used by: List Events.

maxResults.label: Max Results
maxResults.description: Maximum number of events to return. Used by: List Events.
